_comment: Tenants of Record — the Supper Pail Old Deng asks the player to carry to Haoran (verifier fix 1: renamed via loot set_name, NOT a give command with a custom_name component). Haoran clears it with plain clear @s minecraft:rabbit_stew — if the name here changes nothing breaks, the item id is what gets cleared and the carrying_supper tag is the real state. Loot JSON is punctuation-exempt from the quote bans.

lore.text: Still warm. Granny Yun packs for a siege.
For the boy at the fence line.
